mapper.update: UPDATE ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL a SET send_sts_cd = #{send_sts_cd}, send_rslt_typ_cd = #{send_rslt_typ_cd}, ses_real_send_dt = now(), ses_msg_id = #{ses_msg_id}, stm_last_upd_dt = now(), stm_last_upd_user_id = #{stm_last_upd_user_id} WHERE email_send_dtl_seq = ${email_send_dtl_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_MST a LEFT JOIN ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL b on a.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ = b.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ LEFT JOIN ADM_EMAIL_ATTCH_FILE_LST c on b.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ = c.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ WHERE b.SEND_STS_CD = 'SR' and a.STM_FIR_REG_DT > date_add(now(), interval -1 week)

SELECT * FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_MST a LEFT JOIN ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL b on a.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ = b.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ LEFT JOIN ADM_EMAIL_ATTCH_FILE_LST c on b.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ = c.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ WHERE b.SEND_STS_CD = 'SR' and a.STM_FIR_REG_DT > date_add(now(), interval -1 week)
mapper.insert: INSERT into ADM_EMAIL_BL_MST (email_addr, email_cutoff_typ_cd, stm_fir_reg_dt, stm_fir_reg_user_id, stm_last_upd_dt, stm_last_upd_user_id) values (#{email_addr}, #{email_cutoff_typ_cd}, now(), #{server_name}, now(), #{server_name})
